Disciplinary.alternativeAction: Contact the Disciplinary Committee or campus security desk for immediate support.
Disciplinary.notes: Includes ragging, harassment, bullying, threats, assault, theft, and other student-safety incidents.

Electrical.alternativeAction: Use the hostel maintenance module or contact your warden/electrician for hostel-room electrical issues. Classroom or lab electrical faults should be reported through campus infrastructure/maintenance.

IT.alternativeAction: Contact IT Support for campus network or account issues. Hostel-room network issues should include your assigned hostel/room details.

Sanitation.alternativeAction: Report campus cleanliness issues to Housekeeping or the campus cleanliness module.

Mess.alternativeAction: Only mess subscribers can raise mess complaints here. Non-subscribers should contact the cafeteria/vendor counter or student welfare office.

Civil.alternativeAction: Report infrastructure issues to the Maintenance Department or campus infrastructure module.

Personal.alternativeAction: Personal academic or welfare concerns should go through your mentor, department office, or Student Welfare Office.

Other.alternativeAction: Use the relevant campus module if your issue belongs to a more specific area.

isHosteller.description: User must be a hosteler or have hostel assignment details.
isHosteller.failureReason: Your profile is not marked as a hosteller.

messSubscriber.description: User must be subscribed to hostel mess services.
messSubscriber.failureReason: Your profile does not show an active mess subscription.

ownsRoom.description: The complaint must relate to the user's assigned hostel room when a room-specific hostel category is selected.
ownsRoom.failureReason: This complaint type is limited to your assigned hostel room.

assignedDepartment.description: User must have an assigned department in the authenticated profile.
assignedDepartment.failureReason: Your profile does not have an assigned department.
